contextual.title: Protein Supplementation and Weight Loss
contextual.text:
Summary: This randomized control trial of diet with protein supplementation is being conducted to test the hypothesis that in overweight/obese subjects high protein diet may lead to weight loss and improvement in cardio-metabolic profile.
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 Subjects aged between 21 -65 years 

 Subjects with BMI > 23 Kg/m2 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 inclusion criteria: 

 Subjects aged between 21 -65 years 

 Subjects with BMI > 23 Kg/m2
